summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Railway Asset Inspection Management System with 6 new changes. All backend APIs working correctly (27/27 tests passed). Frontend fully functional with all new features implemented: Orange/Red List split with separate KPIs, Station-wise and Asset Type health charts, Asset edit functionality, Excel/PDF export buttons, and proper authorization for grant-admin endpoint.

backend_issues.notes: All 27 backend API tests passed successfully including new features.

passed_tests: Backend: Health check endpoint
Backend: Login with SA001/admin123
Backend: Dashboard stats with orange_list_count (6) and red_list_count (2) separately
Backend: Station-wise health endpoint (31 stations with health data)
Backend: Asset type health endpoint (10 asset types with health data)
Backend: List departments (5 departments)
Backend: List stations (31 stations)
Backend: List locations (49 locations)
Backend: List asset types (10 types)
Backend: List assets (68 assets)
Backend: List users (8 users)
Backend: Create inspection with defective status
Backend: List inspections (18 inspections)
Backend: Orange List - list items (9 items)
Backend: Orange List filter - orange items < 24hrs (7 items)
Backend: Orange List filter - red items > 24hrs (2 items)
Backend: Orange List - mark working
Backend: Orange List - approve working
Backend: Notifications API
Backend: Unread notification count
Backend: Schedules API
Backend: Export Orange List to Excel (200 OK)
Backend: Export Orange List to PDF (200 OK)
Backend: Grant admin authorization - correctly returns 403 for non-superadmin
Backend: Asset update endpoint PUT /api/assets/{id} working
Frontend: Login successful with SA001/admin123
Frontend: Dashboard shows Orange List KPI (4 items)
Frontend: Dashboard shows Red List KPI (4 items)
Frontend: Dashboard has 8 KPI cards total
Frontend: Station-wise Asset Health bar chart present
Frontend: Overall Asset Health pie/donut chart present
Frontend: Asset Type Health horizontal bar chart present
Frontend: Asset Registry page loads with 68 assets
Frontend: Asset edit button (pencil icon) present with data-testid
Frontend: Asset edit dialog opens successfully
Frontend: Orange List page navigation working
Frontend: Orange List page has 3 tabs: Orange (4), Red (4), Pending (0)
Frontend: Orange tab shows items with ORANGE LIST badge
Frontend: Red tab shows items with RED LIST badge and defective since date/time
Frontend: Pending tab working
Frontend: Excel export button present on Orange List page
Frontend: PDF export button present on Orange List page
